route: CrowdGen by Appen - Video Collector - US Based
value_signal: Official page says the project pays $10/hour and can earn up to $200 per week for U.S.-based household video recording tasks.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Must currently reside in the United States, be at least 18, have a 1080p-capable recording device, a head-mount accessory, and a residential environment suitable for household activity recording.
deadline_or_currentness: Current public page is live; intake is first-come first-served and quotas may fill by demographic group.
evidence_gate: Approved account plus completed recording session and verified payout or other usable value.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a truthful participant readiness checklist and device/setup note for the user to review.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must apply and, if selected, complete the recordings and any onboarding steps.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The pay is real, but no selection, task assignment, or payout has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If the U.S. residential video setup is truthful and available, prepare the shortest honest application checklist and device readiness note.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved account or visible usable payout delivery.
